hooks.command: ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; test -x "$ROOT/.harness/bin/decision-hook" || { echo 'decision-hook missing' >&2; exit 2; }; exec "$ROOT/.harness/bin/decision-hook" codex
ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"; test -x "$ROOT/.harness/bin/live-status-hook" && "$ROOT/.harness/bin/live-status-hook" codex || true

ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"; LAUNCHER="$HOME/.local/bin/agent-harness-live-status"; test -n "$ROOT" && test -x "$LAUNCHER" && "$LAUNCHER" start "$ROOT" codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; test -x "$ROOT/.harness/bin/decision-hook" || { echo 'decision-hook missing' >&2; exit 2; }; exec "$ROOT/.harness/bin/decision-hook" codex
ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"; test -x "$ROOT/.harness/bin/live-status-hook" && "$ROOT/.harness/bin/live-status-hook" codex || true
